query:
-- Check the top players with their puzzle counts
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.hasRegistered,
  COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0) as total_puzzles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as total_cycles,
  ROUND(AVG(ch.accuracy), 2) as avg_accuracy
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.hasRegistered
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0) > 0
ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- Check the top players with their puzzle counts
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.hasRegistered,
  COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0) as total_puzzles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as total_cycles,
  ROUND(AVG(ch.accuracy), 2) as avg_accuracy
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.hasRegistered
HAVING COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalPuzzles), 0) > 0
ORDER BY total_puzzles DESC
LIMIT 15;
